old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.68","title":"Repair invalid signed link-frame vector","description":"Discovered during project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7 validation: test/vectors/link_frame.json signed_encrypted vector marks a one-byte payload as signature-present even though a signature trailer requires 48 bytes; test/vectors/generate.py reproduces it.
